focus: Improve realized expectancy on the micro Brain lane by downgrading repeated loser clusters faster while keeping high-quality participation in normal liquidity.
risk_bias: Prefer REDUCE when recent_outcome is negative; reserve BLOCK for execution breakdown, stale market context, or severe thesis mismatch.
extra_rules: Treat recent_outcome as first-class evidence; when profit_factor is below 1 and avg_pips is negative over recent 4 or more trades, do not ALLOW unless probability is exceptional and spread is tight.
High confidence alone is not enough; if the same strategy and side have clustered recent losers, tighten to REDUCE before considering ALLOW.
For MomentumBurst-open_short and MicroTrendRetest-short, require clear asymmetry and clean spread before full ALLOW when recent outcomes are negative.
Keep direction intent by default, but shrink size aggressively when setup quality is mixed and recent_outcome is negative.
Reserve BLOCK for repeated execution breakdown, stale factors, or extreme mismatch between the current thesis and recent realized outcomes.
